1.name: §g§lMeteor
1.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT§7-§d§lLEFT

§7Conjures a slow but powerful meteor
from the sky, dealing massive
damage over a large area.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f50
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f400% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 330%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 70%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f18 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

2.name: §f§lWand Proficiency I
2.description:
§7Improve your §nMain Attack§7's damage
and range when using a wand.

§c⚔ §7Main Attack Damage: §f+5%
§2➼ §7Main Attack Range: §f+2 Blocks

4.name: §h§lShooting Star
4.description:
§7Drastically increase the
speed of your §nMeteor§7 ability.

5.name: §g§lTeleport
5.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lRIGHT

§7Instantly teleport in the
direction you're facing.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f25
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks

6.name: §h§lWand Proficiency II
6.description:
§7Improve your §nMain Attack§7's damage
and range when using a wand.

§c⚔ §7Main Attack Damage: §f+5%
§2➼ §7Main Attack Range: §f+2 Blocks

7.name: §h§lWisdom
7.description:
§7For every §f2% §7or §f2 Raw §7Spell Damage you have
from items, gain §f+1/5s §7Mana Regen (Max 5/5s)

8.name: §g§lHeal
8.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT§7-§d§lRIGHT

§7Heals you and nearby allies in
a large area around you.
§8(When healing others, you can't heal
more than 30% of §ntheir§8 max health)

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f35
§c❤ §7Total Heal: §f15% §8(of your max health)
§2➼ §7Range: §f5 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f0.6s

9.name: §g§lIce Snake
9.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT

§7Summons a fast-moving ice snake that
damages and slows enemies.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f30
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f175% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 55%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f32 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f2 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f40% §7Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

11.name: §f§lAir Mastery
11.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Air attacks.

§f❋ §7Air Damage: §f+3-4
§f❋ §7Air Damage: §f+15%

12.name: §f§lEarth Mastery
12.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Earth attacks.

§2✤ §7Earth Damage: §f+2-4
§2✤ §7Earth Damage: §f+20%

13.name: §f§lFire Mastery
13.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Fire attacks.

§c✹ §7Fire Damage: §f+3-5
§c✹ §7Fire Damage: §f+15%

14.name: §f§lThunder Mastery
14.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Thunder attacks.

§e✦ §7Thunder Damage: §f+1-8
§e✦ §7Thunder Damage: §f+10%

15.name: §f§lWater Mastery
15.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Water attacks.

§b❉ §7Water Damage: §f+2-4
§b❉ §7Water Damage: §f+15%

16.name: §k§lDistortion
16.description:
§7Hitting an enemy with §nEtheric Slash§7 grants up
to §f+20 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 per §f4s§7.

Each §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 gives §f+1§7 Raw Damage
and decays at a rate of §f-1§7 per second,
increasing as you gain §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7.

17.name: §i§lThunderstorm
17.description:
§7After casting §nMeteor§7, generate a lightning
strike near the point of impact, that
adds §f+8§7 Mana to your §bMana Bank §b✺§7
for each aggressive enemy you hit.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f270% §8(of your DPS, per strike)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 150%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 120%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f2.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

18.name: §i§lSunshower
18.description:
§7§nHeal§7 emits a strong light,
damaging nearby enemies.

§nArcane Transfer§7 will damage nearby
enemies when transferring §f30+ §7Mana.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f100% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 70%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 30%)

19.name: §i§lBurning Sigil
19.description:
§7§nMeteor§7 and §nOphanim§7 will leave a sigil of fire
on the ground that damages enemies every §f0.4s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f40% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 25%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 15%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f7 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s

20.name: §f§lCrashing Comet
20.description:
§7Increase the damage of §nMeteor§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+90% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +70%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +20%)

21.name: §i§lAstral Fragmentation
21.description:
§7§nMeteor§7 scatters into debris upon
landing, dealing additional damage.

§nOphanim§7 draws light from the
stars, dealing additional damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+120% §8(of your DPS, for Meteor)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +90%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +30%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+40% §8(of your DPS, for Ophanim)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +30%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +10%)
§3☀ §7Meteor Area of Effect: §f6 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

22.name: §k§lOphanim
22.description:
§7When casting §nMeteor§7, instead summon
§f2 §7orbs of light with §f200 §7Health that will
attack when you use your §nMain Attack§7.

When they damage an enemy, they lose §f20%
§7of their Health. They can be healed back.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §c+30
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 90%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 15%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 15%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f22 Blocks

23.name: §k§lArcane Transfer
23.description:
§7§nMeteor§7, §nIce Snake§7, and §nWind Slash§7 will add §f+13 §7Mana to
a §bMana Bank ✺ §7for every aggressive enemy you hit.
With §nThunderstorm§7, Mana gain from §nMeteor§7 is reduced to §f4§7.

§nHeal§7 will now transfer the contents of your
§bMana Bank ✺ §7into usable Mana instead of healing.

25.name: §i§lInterweave
25.description:
§7Hitting an ally with a §nLightweaver§7 orb
consumes the orb and applies §bShining §#e1dca4✨§7.

§bShining §#e1dca4✨§7 players can be healed from
any distance, and they deal the orb's
damage to nearby enemies.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f6s

26.name: §h§lDisplacement
26.description:
§7Casting §nTeleport§7 while sneaking places an
ethereal image of yourself at your location.

You're teleported to its location upon recasting it.

§2➼ §7Range: §f50 Blocks
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f5s

27.name: §j§lPurification
27.description:
§7§nHeal§7 and §nArcane Transfer§7 will purify
allies of all negative effects and fire.

§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f3s

30.name: §f§lCheaper Ice Snake
30.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nIce Snake§7.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f-5

32.name: §j§lFrozen Tornado
32.description:
§nCasting §7Ice Snake§7 instead summons a frozen
tornado that deals damage every §f0.5s§7.

For every §f+1 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7, the tornado gains
§f+0.025 §3☀ §7Area of Effect and §f+1.1% §c⚔ §7Damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f80% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 60%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 10%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 10%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f6 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f50%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Tornado Duration: §f5s
§d⌛ §7Slow Duration: §f1s

33.name: §j§lFortitude
33.description:
§7Healing §f120% §7of your max health
within §f10s §7will apply a damage bonus
to every player you've healed.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f40% §7Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Allies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f7s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f15s

34.name: §j§lPyrokinesis
34.description:
§7When your §bMana Bank ✺ §7reaches §f30§7,
your §nMain Attack§7 will explode
upon impact with enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 200%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f4 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

35.name: §f§lResilient Light
35.description:
§7Increases the health of §nOphanim§7's
orbs by §f+800 §7and reduces the
damage they take when attacking by §f-5%§7.

36.name: §i§lSnake Nest
36.description:
§7§nIce Snake§7 will summon §f3 §7snakes.

§nFrozen Tornado§7 will summon §f3§7 tornados.
§8(Enemies cannot be damaged by multiple
tornados or snakes at the same time.)§7

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+50% §8(of your DPS, for Ice Snake)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +35%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +15%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+25% §8(of your DPS, for Frozen Tornado)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +5%)

37.name: §f§lSeance
37.description:
§7For every §f5/3s §7Lifesteal you have
from items, gain §f+1% §7Spell Damage (Max 50%)

38.name: §h§lWarp Blast
38.description:
§7Hitting an enemy with §nMain Attack§7 grants up
to §f+8 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 per §f4s§7.

39.name: §h§lGospel of Light
39.description:
§7Nearby players gain §f20%§7
of the Mana you gain from
Mana Regen and Mana Steal.

§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f8 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

40.name: §j§lOrphion's Pulse
40.description:
§7§nHeal§7 becomes slower and stronger,
pulsing §f2 §7more times for greater healing.

§c❤ §7Pulse Self Heal: §f20% §8(of your max health)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1.2s
§3⌚ §7Delay: §f1.5s §8(per pulse)

41.name: §f§lIncandescence
41.description:
§7Increase the damage of §nOphanim§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +20%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: +10%)

42.name: §h§lArcane Restoration
42.description:
§7§nPyrokinesis§7 will add §f+1 §7Mana every
§f0.25s §7to your §bMana Bank ✺ §7when
hitting an aggressive enemy.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f2.5s

43.name: §j§lMeteor Shower
43.description:
§7Casting §nMeteor§7 summons an additional
meteor near the target location for
every §f20 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 you have.
§8(Max 20 Meteors, only one Meteor
Shower can be active at the same time.)§7

§nMeteor§7 and §nAstral Fragmentation§7 become
smaller, dealing §c-20% §c⚔ §7Damage and
losing §c-20% §3☀ §7Area of Effect.

§3☀ §7Target Radius: §f1 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

44.name: §h§lVoid Acceleration
44.description:
§7Double §nMeteor§7's speed and increase its damage.

§nMeteor Shower§7 summons meteors §f+25%§7 faster.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+110% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +75%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: +35%)

45.name: §k§lLightweaver
45.description:
§7Healing §f50% §7of your max health within
§f10s §7will summon a rotating orb that
damages enemies upon contact. (Max 3 orbs)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 30%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f7 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f1.5 Block §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f20s

46.name: §i§lArcane Speed
46.description:
§7You gain a walk speed buff after
casting §nHeal§7 or §nArcane Transfer§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+80% §7Walk Speed
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s

48.name: §i§lPsychokinesis
48.description:
§7Shoots §nMeteor§7 from you as a slow projectile

§2➼ §7Range: §f18 Blocks

49.name: §k§lChaos Explosion
49.description:
§7When your §bMana Bank ✺ §7reaches §f120§7,
casting §nArcane Transfer§7 will rapidly unleash
the last §f3 §7spells you've cast in order.

51.name: §f§lCheaper Ice Snake II
51.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nIce Snake§7.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f-5

52.name: §j§lCrystallize
52.description:
§7§nLightweaver§7 applies §f+7 §bCrystallized §j💎§7
to enemies it hits.

Casting §nIce Snake§7 shatters
enemies with §f100 §bCrystallized §j💎§7,
damaging and slowing them.

§bCrystallized §j💎§7 starts decaying at
a rate of §f-5§7 every second if
none is applied for §f5s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f2000% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 1500%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 250%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 250%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f80%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

53.name: §i§lVacuokinesis
53.description:
§7Your §nMain Attack§7 is imbued with vacuum,
dealing additional damage.

For every §f+1§7 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7, §nVacuokinesis§7
deals §f+1% §c⚔ §7Damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f80% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 80%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

54.name: §k§lDimensional Tear
54.description:
§7Hitting an enemy with §nEtheric Slash§7 tears
open a dimensional rift between you
and your destination.

The rift damages enemies every §f0.4s§7, increases
your §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 gain by §f+25%§7 and reduces
damage taken while standing in it.

The rift's benefits and damage linger
for §f3s§7 upon leaving its area.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f100% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 60%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 20%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 20%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f15%§7 Resistance Bonus (§a❁§7)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f8 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s

55.name: §i§lSentient Snake
55.description:
§7§nIce Snake§7 will follow the direction you're
facing, allowing you to control it.

§nFrozen Tornado§7 drifts towards nearby enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+40% §8(of your DPS, for Ice Snake)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +25%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +15%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+20% §8(of your DPS, for Frozen Tornado)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +15%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +5%)
§2➼ §7Drift Range: §f10 Blocks

57.name: §f§lSearing Light
57.description:
§7Increase the damage of §nSunshower§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+80% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +50%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +20%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +10%)

58.name: §h§lArcane Power
58.description:
§7§nMeteor§7, §nIce Snake§7, and §nWind Slash§7 will add §f+8 §7Mana to
your §bMana Bank ✺ §7for each aggressive mob you hit.
§nFrozen Tornado§7 and §nMeteor Shower§7 will add §f+4 §7Mana.

§nArcane Restoration§7 will restore mana §f0.1s §7faster.

59.name: §h§lRift Rupture
59.description:
§7§nDimensional Tear§7 erupts violently when
created, damaging enemies inside it.

While §nRiftbound§7, §nEtheric Slash§7 implodes your
bound rift instead, damaging nearby enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f1000% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 800%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 100%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 100%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f8 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f2s §8(Riftbound)

60.name: §f§lEverlasting Light
60.description:
§7Increases the health of your orbs
from §nOphanim§7 by §f+3000§7.

62.name: §i§lEtheric Slash
62.description:
§7When using §nTeleport§7, slash through reality
and deal damage to enemies you pierce.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 150%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 50%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

63.name: §f§lFrigid Grasp
63.description:
§7§nIce Snake§7 and §nFrozen Tornado§7 now deal
increased damage and their slow is stronger.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(of your DPS, for Ice Snake)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +15%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +15%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+20% §8(of your DPS, for Frozen Tornado)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +15%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +5%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+10%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies

64.name: §j§lTime Dilation
64.description:
§7Creates an area of effect when sprinting
that increases the walk speed of all
allies the longer they run in it.
§8(You lose 20% Speed Bonus every second
once you stop running)§7

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+10%§7 Walk Speed to Allies §8(per 1s, +200% Max)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f2 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

65.name: §j§lDivination
65.description:
§7Increases your maximum orbs
from §nOphanim§7 by §f+3 §7and
reduces their damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-30% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: -20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: -5%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: -5%)

66.name: §k§lSunflare
66.description:
§7Healing §f250% §7of your max health within §f10s
§7will make your next §nHeal§7 activate §nSunflare§7.

While §nSunflare§7 is active, you will restore
health and mana to all nearby allies, and
your §nOphanim§7 orbs will attack constantly.

§2➼ §7Range: §f12 Blocks
§c❤ §7Health Regen: §f5% per second §8(of your max health)
§b✺ §7Mana Regen: §f5% per second §8(of your max mana)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f20s

68.name: §j§lArcane Overflow
68.description:
§7§nArcane Transfer§7 will allow you to overflow
your mana over its maximum limits. (Max 300)

70.name: §i§lManastorm
70.description:
§7If you have more than §f100
§7Mana, casting a spell will give
you §f+5 §7Mana over §f2s§7.

72.name: §j§lFreezing Sigil
72.description:
§7§nIce Snake§7 will leave a sigil of ice
beneath you that slows and damages
enemies every §f0.8s§7. Allies standing on
the sigil will be immune to knockback.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f20% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 15%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 5%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f7 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f15% §7Slownedd (§c⬤§7) to Enemies, per hit §8(Max 60%)
                §7Knockback Immunity to Allies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s

73.name: §i§lArctic Snake
73.description:
§7§nIce Snake§7 will freeze enemies for §f2s§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f100% §7Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f2s

74.name: §f§lGleam
74.description:
§7Increase the damage of §nOphanim§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +10%)

75.name: §h§lAccelerated Strike
75.description:
§7§nTime Dilation§7 increases your §nMain Attack§7 damage
for every §f10%§7 Walk Speed you gain from it.

Hitting an enemy with your §nMain Attack§7 stops
§nTime Dilation§7 from decaying for §f2s§7.

§c⚔ §7Main Attack Damage: §f+4% §8(per 10% Walk Speed)

76.name: §f§lInflux Shift
76.description:
§7Increase the amount of §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 generated
by §f+20%§7 and effects gained from it by §f+25%§7.

77.name: §i§lDevitalize
77.description:
§7§nHeal§7 and §nArcane Transfer§7 weaken nearby enemies.

You gain §f+5 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 for every enemy weakened.
(Up to +15)

§e✧ §7Effect: §f-15%§7 Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies

78.name: §h§lMana Current
78.description:
§7§nDimensional Tear§7 reduces the mana
cost of your spells while inside it.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f-25%

79.name: §k§lRiftbound
79.description:
§7Casting §nHeal§7 while sneaking binds you to your
§nDimensional Tear§7, making you §nRiftbound§7.

While §nRiftbound§7, your §nDimensional Tear§7 follows you,
reaches further and your §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 stops decaying.

§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f20s

80.name: §k§lJudrajim
80.description:
§7When your §bMana Bank §b✺§7 reaches §f140§7,
casting §nArcane Transfer§7 while sneaking
will summon a ball lightning that deals
damage to nearby enemies and drains
§f2§7 Mana every §f0.25s§7, until you run out
of Mana.

Mana cost and damage increases by
§f20%§7 every time it deals damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f40% §8(of your DPS)

82.description:
§7Casting §nFrozen Tornado§7 inside your §nDimensional
Tear§7 infuses it with otherworldly energies,
turning it into a §nTime Vortex§7.

§nTime Vortex§7 deals damage §f25%§7 faster, lasts
longer and grants §f+1.5 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7 every
time it deals damage to an enemy.

83.description:
§7§nDimensional Tear§7 is now inhabited
by a §bRiftspawn§7 while active.

The §bRiftspawn§7 shoots homing distorting
blasts to nearby enemies every §f0.5s§7,

84.name: §j§lParadox
84.description:
§7You send §f20%§7 of the damage you take
to the future, dealing it over §f8s§7 and
borrow mana from the past, refunding
§f25%§7 of your spent mana over §f10s§7.

For every §f+1 §bDistortion §#c267f7≈§7, the
mana is refunded §f-0.02s§7 faster.

85.name: §f§lBlitz
85.description:
§7Increase the damage of §nIce Snake§7

Increase the damage of §nFrozen Tornado§7

The Sun will summon solar wisps that move

Your §nDimensional Tear§7 overloads, growing

While it is overloaded, it deals §f+400%§7 increased
